main.description: Assert a first-class BILL-OF-MATERIALS edge (parent CONTAINS child) into the kotoba Datom log (:bom.edge/*). parent → :product/id or :part/id; child → :part/id or :material/id. Records a PUBLIC decomposition only (teardown / ingredient label / supplier-list filing), with a bounded quantity + dependency-strength estimate. AGGREGATE-FIRST + sourcing-honest (uchiwake G2/G5): quantity & criticality are :representative, NEVER a confidential recipe or contract figure, and framed toward redundancy + accountability — never a clone/counterfeit recipe or interdiction map.

sourcing.description: uchiwake G5; BOM decompositions are typically :representative

criticalityBp.description: 0..1000 = 0.0..1.0 (integer implied units); how single-sourced / hard-to-substitute the child is. NOT a contract figure

qtyMilli.description: quantity of child per one parent in THOUSANDTHS (magnitude × 1000, integer implied units); bounded public estimate, NEVER a confidential recipe

supplier.description: → kabuto :company/id of the disclosed supplier of the child, if known

tier.description: BOM depth tier: 1 = direct component of finished good
